span.p: ③ APPLY — execute the frozen plan · NO resolution

sysupgrade gate — will the
repo upgrade break something?

execute, in order:
AUR blockers → repo pacman -Su --dbpath synced
→ main AUR makepkg + pacman -U → removals
② RESOLVE — the whole cart, at ADD (never at apply)

expand + classify every staged root
· one classify_full pass, honoring pins

did the picked row
pin a source?

installed foreign AUR pkg,
named directly?

declared conflict among
staged + installed?
(no matching replaces=)

freeze the resolved plan
into the cart ✎
① SHELL · you drive the session

numbered results —
sync-repo rows + AUR rows

a numbered row,
or a typed name?

an AUR item
not yet reviewed?

show — render the FROZEN plan
· no re-resolve

✗ cart dropped —
the frozen plan is stale

repo pkgs installed
from the synced db ✔
